name: io.github.codespar/mcp-ap2
description: Agent authorization, audit trails, trust framework — AP2 protocol (Google)

environment_variables.name: AP2_SANDBOX
environment_variables.description: Set to true for sandbox mode

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register an AI agent as a trusted payer

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Get agent registration and trust status

tools.name: authorize_payment
tools.description: Request payment authorization with scoped limits

tools.name: get_audit_trail
tools.description: Get full audit trail for a transaction

tools.name: list_payment_methods
tools.description: List available payment methods via AP2 partners
